description_long: This is a single-story rectangular school building with a flat, dark roof and a mix of brown and off-white exterior walls. The roof features visible HVAC units and metallic piping, suggesting modern utility infrastructure. There are multiple entry points, including a main entrance with a ramp and railings, and a secondary covered loading area. The building is surrounded by concrete walkways and safety railings, with several yellow bollards marking the perimeter near the entrance. Windows are minimal and mostly covered, giving the structure a utilitarian appearance. The overall design is functional, with accessibility features and clear separation of entry and service areas.
description: A flat-roofed, single-story school building with brown and off-white walls, rooftop HVAC units, and accessible entryways with ramps and railings.
description_view_0: The view shows the side of the building with a large covered loading area, rooftop HVAC units, and brown exterior walls.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear or service side, featuring the covered loading dock, green HVAC units, and a fenced ramp.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance with a ramp, railings, off-white facade, and several yellow bollards.
description_view_3: This side view shows a long brown wall, rooftop piping, and the edge of the entrance ramp with bollards.
